tool_args.label: 2023 November Forecast MTA Share of Net Cash Deficit
2023 November Forecast CDOT Share of Net Cash Deficit
2024 Final Proposed Budget MTA Share of Net Cash Deficit
2024 Final Proposed Budget CDOT Share of Net Cash Deficit
MNR identified savings initiatives generate approximately $57 million annually

payload.claim_text: During 2023, concrete initiatives have been identified to generate savings that lower MNR's outyear deficits by approximately $57 million annually beginning in 2024 of which $40 million represents the MTA share and $17 million the CDOT share
payload.description: MNR efficiency initiatives to reduce outyear deficits

tool_args.label: Shop-specific practices adjusted to reduce impacts of unplanned events ($13M savings)

payload.claim_text: Shop-specific practices are being adjusted for more efficient workflow to reduce the impacts of unplanned events ($13 million over the Plan period)

tool_args.label: Improved rail equipment scheduling reduces overtime ($43M savings)

payload.claim_text: Improved rail equipment scheduling for required maintenance and inspections along with ensuring proper staffing at shop locations will result in reductions to overtime ($43 million)

tool_args.label: Equipment and crew scheduling to match demand ($32M savings)

payload.claim_text: Equipment and crew are being more efficiently scheduled to match demand ($32 million)

tool_args.label: Appropriate inventory for required maintenance ($45M savings)

payload.claim_text: MNR is also working to ensure appropriate inventory is available for required maintenance ($45 million)

tool_args.label: Management oversight of operating contracts better aligns third-party services ($33M savings)

payload.claim_text: Management oversight of operating contracts is better aligning third-party services at work locations along the right-of-way ($33 million)

tool_args.label: Maintenance of Way - Data Analysis and Decision Support

payload.project_name: Maintenance of Way - Data Analysis and Decision Support
payload.description: Hire five employees to staff a new Productivity/Efficiency Team to reduce costs by optimizing MoW infrastructure projects for the Capital Program, improve overtime analytics, and enhance project scheduling and reporting

payload.scope: MTA Metro-North Railroad Total East of Hudson and West of Hudson
